# BAIOS — Tam İçerik Dökümü (AI modeli tek hamlede yutsun)

Son güncellenme: 2026-06-04
Kaynak: https://baios.dev

---

# /bireysel/hizli-baslangic.html

# Hızlı Başlangıç

🇬🇧 [English](../en/bireysel/hizli-baslangic.html)

On dakikada BAIOS'u kurup ilk projeni açıp ilk skill'ini çalıştıracaksın.

---

## 1. Kurulum (1 dk)

```bash
# Erken sürüm — GitHub'dan kurulum (PyPI yayını yakında)
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios && ./run.sh start
```

İlk çalıştırmada kısa kişiselleştirme sorar (isim, dil). Tamam deyince ana menü açılır.

**Web arayüzü:**
```bash
baios serve
# → http://localhost:8000
```

---

## 2. LLM Provider Seç (1 dk)

En az bir LLM provider gerekir. Üç seçenek:

**OpenAI (API key varsa):**
```bash
baios config set llm.provider openai
baios config set openai.api_key sk-...
```

**Anthropic:**
```bash
baios config set llm.provider anthropic
baios config set anthropic.api_key sk-ant-...
```

**Yerel Ollama (internet yok, ücretsiz):**
```bash
# Ayrı pencerede:
ollama serve
ollama pull llama3.2

baios config set llm.provider local
```

> Hassas veri varsa **local** öner. Hız ve doğruluk istersen OpenAI/Anthropic.

---

## 3. İlk Proje (2 dk)

**Web UI:**
1. Sol menü → **Projeler** → **Yeni**
2. Ad: `denemem`
3. Açıklama: `BAIOS'u denemek için`
4. **Oluştur**

**CLI:**
```bash
baios> /proje yeni denemem "BAIOS'u denemek için"
baios> /proje sec denemem
```

Proje dizini oluşturuldu: `~/.baios/projects/denemem/`.

---

## 4. Çalışma Disiplini Üret (2 dk)

Proje ne için? Disiplin Engine'e söyle, LLM sana özel iş akışı hazırlasın.

**Web UI:**
1. Proje sayfasında **Çalışma Disiplini** bölümüne gir
2. **Hedef:** "Haftalık bütçe tablosu tutmak ve ay sonu özet çıkarmak"
3. **Üret**

Sonuç `discipline_v1.md` — 3-5 fazlık adım adım yöntem, önerilen ARM ve skill'ler.

---

## 5. İlk Skill (2 dk)

Basit bir skill deneyelim — `arastirma`:

**Web UI:**
1. Sol menü → **Kütüphane** → **Skill**
2. `arastirma` bul → **Çalıştır**
3. `konu`: `en iyi sabah rutinleri`
4. **Çalıştır**

Üç adım çalışır:
1. Web araması
2. LLM özet
3. Dosyaya kaydet → `~/.baios/projects/denemem/outputs/arastirma_*.md`

---

## 6. ARM Kur (opsiyonel, 1 dk)

Gmail okuma istersen `gmail` ARM'ını kur:

**Web UI:**
1. Sol menü → **Kütüphane** → **ARM**
2. `gmail` → **Kur**
3. Google hesap OAuth akışı
4. Tamam

Artık skill'lerde `gmail` kullanılabilir.

---

## 7. Chat'ten Konuş (1 dk)

Artık doğal dilde konuşabilirsin:

```
baios> bugünkü e-postalarımı özetle
  → gmail arm + llm_ozet skill
baios> istanbul hava durumu
  → weather arm
baios> bu araştırma dosyasından 10 flashcard çıkar
  → flashcard skill
```

BAIOS niyeti okur, uygun ARM/Skill'i çalıştırır. Riskli işlemde onay ister.

---

## Sonraki Adımlar

| İstiyorsan | Bak |
|---|---|
| Daha fazla senaryo | [Senaryolar](senaryolar.html) |
| Kendi skill'ini yazmak | [Geliştirici rehberi](../kaynaklar/gelistiriciler.html) |
| MCP sunucu bağlamak | [MCP rehberi](../kaynaklar/mcp-rehberi.html) |
| Tüm bileşen listesi | [Katalog](../katalog.html) |
| Takılırsan | Sağ alttaki omgunbay sohbet |

---

## Sorun Giderme

**Kurulum başarısız:**
```bash
# Python 3.12+ ve git gerekir
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios && ./run.sh start
```

**Web UI açılmıyor:**
Port 8000 başka bir uygulamada olabilir. `baios serve --port 8080`

**LLM hatası:**
```bash
baios config show       # mevcut provider'ı gör
baios config test llm   # bağlantı testi
```

**Log:**
```bash
tail -f ~/.baios/logs/baios.log
```

---

# /bireysel/senaryolar.html

# Senaryolar

🇬🇧 [English](../en/bireysel/senaryolar.html)

BAIOS'un soyut tanımı yerine **gerçek işlerde nasıl çalıştığı**. Her senaryo kendi kullanıcısının gerçek bir gününden parça.

---

## 🎓 Öğretmen — Ders hazırlığı + öğrenci takibi

**Hedef:** Haftalık matematik dersini planla, yoklama tut, öğrenci dosyaları güncel olsun.

**BAIOS kurgusu:**
- Proje: `matematik-8-a`
- Bağlı ARM'lar: `file`, `dosya_oku`, `calendar`, `gmail_send`
- Bağlı skill'ler: `konu_aciklama`, `flashcard`, `gunluk_ozet`

**Tipik gün:**
```
baios> /proje sec matematik-8-a
baios> gelecek hafta trigonometri ders planı hazırla
  → konu_aciklama skill → docs/ders_plan_hafta14.md
baios> bu konudan 20 flashcard çıkar
  → flashcard skill → outputs/flashcards_trigonometri.csv
baios> ayşe'nin son sınav notunu dosyaya ekle 75
  → file arm → docs/ogrenciler/ayse.md güncel
baios> /otomasyon kur: her pazar 20:00 — hafta özetini bana e-posta at
```

---

## 📊 Muhasebeci — Fatura analizi + KDV kontrolü

**Hedef:** Ay sonu faturalarını kontrol et, KDV tutarlarını doğrula, rapor çıkar.

**BAIOS kurgusu:**
- Proje: `muhasebe-2026`
- ARM'lar: `file`, `dosya_oku` (PDF), `sql` (kayıt db)
- Flow: `muhasebe_kontrol`

**Tipik gün:**
```
baios> /proje sec muhasebe-2026
baios> bu ay gelen faturaları docs/faturalar-nisan/ içine koydum, kontrol et
  → dosya_oku (PDF) → llm analiz → tutarsızlık uyarısı
  → sql arm → ay toplamı hesapla → rapor.md
baios> şirket X için nisan özeti hazırla
  → veri_analiz skill → outputs/sirket_X_nisan.md
```

**Audit:** Her aksiyon `~/.baios/audit/` içinde kayıt — sonradan kim ne yaptı sorusuna cevap.

---

## ✍️ İçerik üretici — Blog + sosyal paylaşım

**Hedef:** Haftalık blog yazısı + Twitter/LinkedIn özetleri.

**BAIOS kurgusu:**
- Proje: `blog-kisilik-gelisimi`
- ARM'lar: `brave_search`, `web_reader`, `file`, `notion`
- Skill'ler: `arastirma`, `blog_post_taslak`, `url_ozet`, `gorsel_prompt`

**Tipik gün:**
```
baios> yeni konu: "sabah rutini bilimi"
baios> /skill calistir arastirma konu="sabah rutini bilimi"
  → brave_search + llm + file → docs/arastirma_sabah_rutini.md
baios> bu araştırmadan 1200 kelimelik blog post yaz, okuyucu: girişimci
  → blog_post_taslak skill → outputs/blog_sabah_rutini.md
baios> aynı konu için LinkedIn post taslağı (3 paragraf)
baios> blog'a görsel prompt öner
  → gorsel_prompt skill → dalle ile görsel üret
```

---

## 🔬 Veri bilimci — CSV keşfi + rapor

**Hedef:** Müşteri segmentasyon CSV'sini anla, ilk bulguları yaz, grafik öner.

**BAIOS kurgusu:**
- Proje: `musteri-segmentasyon-q2`
- ARM'lar: `file`, `sql`, `http`
- Skill: `veri_analiz`

**Tipik gün:**
```
baios> docs/customers.csv yükle
baios> /skill calistir veri_analiz dosya=docs/customers.csv
  → sql arm → temel istatistik
  → llm → bulgu yorumu
  → file → outputs/bulgular.md + grafik_tarif.md
baios> bu bulgulara göre 3 slayt taslağı
baios> /wiki olustur musteri-segmentasyon-bulgular  ← bilgi birikimi
```

---

## 🧑‍💻 Yazılımcı — baios.dev dogfood

**Hedef:** baios.dev web sitesini kendisi üzerinden yönet (bu sitenin gerçek hikayesi).

**BAIOS kurgusu:**
- Proje: `baios-dev` (template'ten)
- ARM'lar: `git_ops`, `github`, `deploy`, `browser`, `web_reader`, `file`
- Skill'ler: `landing_copy_revize`, `blog_post_taslak`, `changelog_uret`, `release_notes`, `site_qa`
- Flow: `site_release`

**Tipik release:**
```
baios> /proje sec baios-dev
baios> yeni blog: "BAIOS neden ajan değil"
  → blog_post_taslak → outputs/blog_*.md (insan onayı)
baios> /flow calistir site_release versiyon=v2.6
  → changelog + release_notes → git branch → commit → push → PR aç
baios> PR merge'den sonra /arm deploy trigger main
baios> /arm deploy wait 300
baios> /skill calistir site_qa url=https://baios.dev
```

[Detaylı hikaye →](../felsefe.html#ajan-değil-katman)

---

## 🎓 Araştırmacı — Kaynak tarama + wiki birikimi

**Hedef:** Doktora tezi için "yapay zeka + hukuk" literatürü, sürekli artan wiki.

**BAIOS kurgusu:**
- Proje: `doktora-tez-ai-hukuk`
- ARM'lar: `brave_search`, `web_reader`, `file`, `notion`
- Skill'ler: `arastirma`, `url_ozet`
- Wiki otomatik üretimi

**Tipik gün:**
```
baios> bu akademik makale URL'sini oku ve özetle: https://arxiv.org/abs/...
  → web_reader + llm_ozet → outputs/kaynak_N.md
baios> önemli bulgulardan biri: "AI karar verme şeffaflık sorunu"
  → /wiki olustur ai-karar-seffafligi
baios> geçen ay özetlediğim tüm kaynakları göster
  → file arm → docs/kaynaklar/ listele
baios> ilgili wiki sayfalarını LLM context'e ekle ve tez 3. bölümü için taslak hazırla
```

**Kazanç:** Her kaynak bilgiye kalıcı eklenir. Bir ay sonra LLM değişse bile birikim korunur.

---

## Ortak Bağ: Disiplin

Altı senaryoda da farklı meslek, farklı iş. Ortak olan:
1. **Proje** — BAIOS her işi bir projede yaşatır.
2. **Disiplin** — Çalışma yöntemi dosyada, tekrarlanabilir.
3. **Onay** — Riskli işlem onay ister.
4. **Context** — LLM her zaman güncel duruma bakıyor.
5. **Birikim** — Her proje kendi bilgisini birikir, wiki büyür.

---

## Senin senaryon?

[Tutorial ile ilk projeyi aç →](../kaynaklar/tutorial.html) ve kendi disiplinini kur. Sorun çıkarsa sağ alttaki **omgunbay** sohbet penceresinden sor.

---

# /edge/beta-kayit.html

# Edge Beta

🇬🇧 [English](../en/edge/beta-kayit.html)

BAIOS Edge henüz genel sürüme hazır değil, ama **beta programı** açılıyor. Kayıt olursan:

- **İlk beta bildirimi** — hazır olduğunda ilk bilen sen.
- **Donanım uyumluluk listesi** — hangi cihazların desteklendiği netleşince.
- **Prototip paylaşımları** — aylık gelişme özeti.
- **Beta katılımcı çağrısı** — pilot kullanım için davet.

---

## Kayıt

**E-posta:** edge@baios.dev

Konuya **"Edge Beta Kayıt"** yaz. Mesajında şunları paylaşırsan hızlanırız:

- Hangi donanımın var (Pi 4/5, Jetson, ESP32, robot, vb.)
- Düşündüğün senaryo (akıllı ev, sensör, robot, maker)
- İletişim için tercih (e-posta yeterli mi, Telegram/Discord gruba katılır mısın)

---

## Ne Zaman?

Edge geliştirme aktif. Kesin tarih yok ama hedefler:

| Aşama | Hedef |
|---|---|
| Raspberry Pi 4 prototip | 2026 Q3 |
| ESP32 köprü modu | 2026 Q4 |
| Jetson Orin desteği | 2027 Q1 |
| Beta katılımcılarla pilot | 2027 Q1-Q2 |
| Genel sürüm | 2027 sonrası |

---

## Bu Arada

Bireysel BAIOS **şimdi kararlı** — PC üstünde kullanabilir, edge prototipini hazırlarken dil disiplinini öğrenebilirsin.

[Bireysel kurulum →](../bireysel/hizli-baslangic.html) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Senaryolar →](../bireysel/senaryolar.html)

---

## Katkıda Bulun

Edge tarafında kod / donanım / dokümantasyon katkısı yapmak istersen GitHub'a:

[github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios](https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios)

Edge konuları için issue şablonu: `[edge]` prefix'li açabilirsin.

---

# /edge/index.html

# Edge

🇬🇧 [English](../en/edge/index.html)

Gömülü cihazlar için BAIOS. Küçük kaynaklı donanımda core yetenekler.

> **Durum:** Yakında. Aktif araştırma / erken prototipleme. Beta duyurusuna [buradan](beta-kayit.html) kayıt ol.

---

## Vizyon

BAIOS bir PC katmanı değil. ESP32'ye sıkışmış bir sensör-cihaz, Raspberry Pi üzerinde bir robot, akıllı ev kontrolcüsü — hepsi **aynı çalışma disiplini** ile konuşsun.

- **Doğal dil:** "Salondaki sıcaklık 25 dereceyi geçerse pencereyi aç."
- **Context:** Cihaz kendi sensörlerini, geçmiş değerlerini, kural setini bilir.
- **Bağımsız:** Tüm LLM çağrıları yerel (küçük model) veya koşullu bulut.
- **Kontrollü:** Riskli aksiyonlar (motor çalıştır, kapı aç) onay zinciri ile.

---

## Mini-BAIOS Profili

**Mimari:** Tam BAIOS'un alt kümesi — core + sınırlı ARM seti.

**Hedeflenen kaynaklar:**
- **ESP32 sınıfı:** 8MB flash, 512KB RAM — sadece kural motoru + MQTT köprüsü, LLM dışarıda.
- **Raspberry Pi 4 sınıfı:** 1GB RAM — core + yerel 4K LLM + 6-8 ARM.
- **Jetson Nano / Orin sınıfı:** Tam BAIOS + yerel büyük LLM.

**Seçili ARM'lar (planlı):**
- `mqtt` — sensör okuma/yazma
- `homeassistant` — akıllı ev REST
- `http` — genel
- `shell` (kısıtlı whitelist)
- `file` (sadece belirli dizinler)
- `sql` (SQLite sensör kaydı)
- `rss` (opsiyonel)

---

## Kullanım Senaryoları

### Akıllı Ev Kontrol
Raspberry Pi + Home Assistant köprüsü. "Sabah 7'de alarm duyulduğunda perdeleri aç, kahve makinesini çalıştır" gibi dil tabanlı kurallar.

### Sensör Veri Birikimi
ESP32 cluster → MQTT → Mini-BAIOS → SQLite → günlük özet LLM. Her sabah "dün evin ortalama nem/sıcaklık/ses seviyesi" raporu.

### Robot Komut Köprüsü
Robot işletim sistemi + BAIOS. Operatör "yerde sol alt köşeyi temizle" diye komut verir, BAIOS komutu ROS mesajlarına çevirir, risk değerlendirmesi yapar.

### Maker & Hobi
ESP32 + OLED ekran + sensör + BAIOS Mini. Evde her cihazın "açıklaması" olur — cihaza sor, cihaz cevaplar.

[Detaylı örnekler →](ornekler.html)

---

## Ne Sınırlı, Ne Değil

**Edge BAIOS'ta OLMAYAN:**
- Web UI
- 17 kanal (çoğu ağır)
- Tam skill/flow engine
- Browser (Playwright)
- Wiki sistemi (kısıtlı olabilir)

**Edge BAIOS'ta OLAN:**
- Proje + context (light)
- Seçili ARM'lar
- Kural motoru
- Onaylı otomasyon
- MQTT pub/sub entegrasyon
- Opsiyonel yerel LLM (küçük model)

---

## Beta Programı

Aktif prototipleme aşaması. İlk destekli donanım:
- Raspberry Pi 4 / 5
- Jetson Orin Nano
- ESP32 (köprü modu)

**Beta katılımcı profili:**
- Maker, ev otomasyonu meraklısı, robotikçi
- Kendi donanımı var
- Feedback paylaşmaya açık

[Beta duyurusu al →](beta-kayit.html)

---

# /edge/ornekler.html

# Edge Örnekleri

🇬🇧 [English](../en/edge/ornekler.html)

Somut kullanım hikayeleri — her biri farklı donanım, farklı iş.

---

## 🏠 Akıllı Ev: "Sabah Rutini"

**Donanım:** Raspberry Pi 4, Home Assistant, Zigbee köprüsü

**Kurgu:**
- Proje: `ev`
- ARM: `homeassistant`, `calendar`, `mqtt`
- Otomasyon: "Sabah alarmı" + "akşam kilitleme"

**Kural (doğal dil):**
```
her hafta içi sabah 7:00:
  1. yatak odası perdesini aç
  2. kahve makinesini çalıştır (su seviyesi %30'un üstündeyse)
  3. bana bugünün hava durumunu ve takvim özetini söyle
```

**BAIOS nasıl yapar:**
- Cron tetikler → homeassistant (perde) → homeassistant (kahve + sensör) → weather + calendar → TTS

**Neden BAIOS:** Hepsi tek yerden, aynı dilde. Bozulursa komutu değiştir, kod yazma.

---

## 📊 Sensör Veri: "Ev Sağlık Özeti"

**Donanım:** 5× ESP32 sensör (sıcaklık, nem, ses, CO2, ışık) + Raspberry Pi 4 brain

**Kurgu:**
- ESP32'ler MQTT'ye yayınlıyor (saniyede değer)
- Pi üstünde Mini-BAIOS MQTT dinliyor
- SQLite'a kaydediyor
- Her sabah 8:00 günlük özet LLM'e gidiyor

**Rapor örneği:**
> "Dün gece salonda CO2 seviyesi 1400 ppm'e çıktı (03:00-05:00). Yatak odasında ses 2 saat boyunca 45dB üstündeydi. Önerim: havalandırmayı akşam 22:00'de 15 dk aç."

**BAIOS skill:** `sensor_gun_ozet` (edge için özel)

---

## 🤖 Robot: "Oda Temizleme Komutları"

**Donanım:** Jetson Orin Nano + LIDAR + ROS 2

**Kurgu:**
- Operatör sesli komut veriyor
- BAIOS STT → niyet analizi → ROS 2 goal mesajı
- Risk kontrolü (kırılacak eşya var mı, şarj yeterli mi)
- Aksiyon → audit'e kayıt

**Komut örneği:**
```
operatör: "mutfağın sağ tarafından başla, 20 dakika içinde salona geç"
BAIOS: 
  - rota_planla(start="mutfak_sag", end="salon", sure=20dk)
  - şarj=%85 → OK
  - kırılacak_eşya tespit → "dikkat: vazo x=3.2 y=1.8"
  - onay? → operator OK
  - ROS goal publish
```

---

## 🔧 Maker: "Konuşan Akvaryum"

**Donanım:** ESP32 + OLED + sıcaklık/pH sensörü + Mini-BAIOS (Pi Zero üstünde)

**Kurgu:**
- Akvaryum sensörlerini okur
- Pi Zero'daki Mini-BAIOS kullanıcının balıklarının türünü/bakım kurallarını bilir
- Anomali durumunda e-posta/Telegram

**Kullanıcı sohbeti (telefondan):**
```
user: "bugün su nasıl?"
BAIOS: "Sıcaklık 24.8°C (ideal 24-26), pH 7.2 (ideal 7.0-7.5). 
       Nitrit seviyesi dün 0.1'e çıktı, bugün 0 — güzel. 
       3 gündür yem değiştirmedin, hatırlatayım mı?"
```

---

## 🚗 Sürücü Asistanı (araç içi)

**Donanım:** Jetson Nano + CAN-bus adaptör + mikrofon + hoparlör

**Kurgu:**
- Araç sensörlerine (yakıt, motor sıcaklık, hız) erişim
- BAIOS sürücü ile doğal dil konuşur
- Trafik verisi (offline harita veri) + hava durumu

**Senaryo:**
```
user: "eve gidiş için yakıt yeter mi?"
BAIOS: "Evet, kalan yakıtla ~280 km. Eve 95 km. 
       Yolda 2 benzin istasyonu var, ihtiyaç yok. 
       Hava bozuyor — yağmur 35 dk sonra başlar, dikkat."
```

---

## ⚙️ Endüstriyel: Makine Bakım Tahmini

**Donanım:** Fabrika makine PLC + Modbus gateway + Raspberry Pi cluster + Mini-BAIOS

**Kurgu:**
- PLC sensör verisi → MQTT
- BAIOS saatlik anomali tespiti (basit ML)
- Bakım mühendisine Telegram bildirim + dosya log

**Kullanıcı:**
```
mühendis: "makine 3 son hafta nasıl?"
BAIOS: "Titreşim 3. hafta %18 arttı. Son 24 saatte lokal pik 
       %32. Bu trend devam ederse 9-12 gün içinde rulman 
       değişimi gerekecek. Stokta yedek var mı kontrol edeyim mi?"
```

---

## Ortak Özellik: Hepsi Aynı BAIOS

Altı senaryoda da **aynı core** çalışıyor:
- Proje disiplini
- Context katmanları
- Onay zinciri
- Audit log

Fark sadece **hangi ARM'lar aktif** ve **LLM nerede** (yerel vs bulut).

---

## Beta'ya Katıl

Yukarıdaki senaryolardan birini kurmak istiyorsan:
[Beta duyurusu al →](beta-kayit.html)

---

# /en/bireysel/hizli-baslangic.html

# Quick Start

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../bireysel/hizli-baslangic.html)

In ten minutes you'll install BAIOS, open your first project, and run your first skill.

---

## 1. Installation (1 min)

```bash
# Early version — install from GitHub (PyPI release coming soon)
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios && ./run.sh start
```

On the first run it asks a few short personalization questions (name, language). Once you confirm, the main menu opens.

**Web interface:**
```bash
baios serve
# → http://localhost:8000
```

---

## 2. Choose an LLM Provider (1 min)

At least one LLM provider is required. Three options:

**OpenAI (if you have an API key):**
```bash
baios config set llm.provider openai
baios config set openai.api_key sk-...
```

**Anthropic:**
```bash
baios config set llm.provider anthropic
baios config set anthropic.api_key sk-ant-...
```

**Local Ollama (no internet, free):**
```bash
# In a separate window:
ollama serve
ollama pull llama3.2

baios config set llm.provider local
```

> If you have sensitive data, prefer **local**. If you want speed and accuracy, use OpenAI/Anthropic.

---

## 3. Your First Project (2 min)

**Web UI:**
1. Left menu → **Projeler** → **Yeni**
2. Name: `denemem`
3. Description: `BAIOS'u denemek için`
4. **Oluştur**

**CLI:**
```bash
baios> /proje yeni denemem "BAIOS'u denemek için"
baios> /proje sec denemem
```

The project directory is created: `~/.baios/projects/denemem/`.

---

## 4. Generate a Working Discipline (2 min)

What is the project for? Tell the Discipline Engine and let the LLM prepare a workflow tailored to you.

**Web UI:**
1. On the project page, go to the **Çalışma Disiplini** section
2. **Goal:** "Keep a weekly budget table and produce an end-of-month summary"
3. **Üret**

The result is `discipline_v1.md` — a step-by-step method in 3-5 phases, with recommended ARMs and skills.

---

## 5. Your First Skill (2 min)

Let's try a simple skill — `arastirma`:

**Web UI:**
1. Left menu → **Kütüphane** → **Skill**
2. Find `arastirma` → **Çalıştır**
3. `konu`: `en iyi sabah rutinleri`
4. **Çalıştır**

Three steps run:
1. Web search
2. LLM summary
3. Save to file → `~/.baios/projects/denemem/outputs/arastirma_*.md`

---

## 6. Install an ARM (optional, 1 min)

If you want to read Gmail, install the `gmail` ARM:

**Web UI:**
1. Left menu → **Kütüphane** → **ARM**
2. `gmail` → **Kur**
3. Google account OAuth flow
4. Done

Now `gmail` is available in skills.

---

## 7. Talk from Chat (1 min)

Now you can speak in natural language:

```
baios> bugünkü e-postalarımı özetle
  → gmail arm + llm_ozet skill
baios> istanbul hava durumu
  → weather arm
baios> bu araştırma dosyasından 10 flashcard çıkar
  → flashcard skill
```

BAIOS reads your intent and runs the appropriate ARM/Skill. For risky operations it asks for approval.

---

## Next Steps

| If you want | See |
|---|---|
| More scenarios | [Scenarios](senaryolar.html) |
| To write your own skill | [Developer guide](../kaynaklar/gelistiriciler.html) |
| To connect an MCP server | [MCP guide](../kaynaklar/mcp-rehberi.html) |
| The full component list | [Catalog](../katalog.html) |
| If you get stuck | The omgunbay chat at the bottom right |

---

## Troubleshooting

**Installation fails:**
```bash
# Requires Python 3.12+ and git
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios && ./run.sh start
```

**Web UI won't open:**
Port 8000 may be used by another application. `baios serve --port 8080`

**LLM error:**
```bash
baios config show       # see the current provider
baios config test llm   # connection test
```

**Log:**
```bash
tail -f ~/.baios/logs/baios.log
```

---

# /en/bireysel/senaryolar.html

# Scenarios

Instead of an abstract definition of BAIOS, **how it actually works in real work**. Each scenario is a slice from a real day of its user.

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../bireysel/senaryolar.html)

---

## 🎓 Teacher — Lesson prep + student tracking

**Goal:** Plan the weekly math lesson, keep attendance, and keep student files up to date.

**BAIOS setup:**
- Project: `matematik-8-a`
- Connected ARMs: `file`, `dosya_oku`, `calendar`, `gmail_send`
- Connected skills: `konu_aciklama`, `flashcard`, `gunluk_ozet`

**A typical day:**
```
baios> /proje sec matematik-8-a
baios> gelecek hafta trigonometri ders planı hazırla
  → konu_aciklama skill → docs/ders_plan_hafta14.md
baios> bu konudan 20 flashcard çıkar
  → flashcard skill → outputs/flashcards_trigonometri.csv
baios> ayşe'nin son sınav notunu dosyaya ekle 75
  → file arm → docs/ogrenciler/ayse.md güncel
baios> /otomasyon kur: her pazar 20:00 — hafta özetini bana e-posta at
```

---

## 📊 Accountant — Invoice analysis + VAT check

**Goal:** Check end-of-month invoices, verify VAT amounts, produce a report.

**BAIOS setup:**
- Project: `muhasebe-2026`
- ARMs: `file`, `dosya_oku` (PDF), `sql` (record db)
- Flow: `muhasebe_kontrol`

**A typical day:**
```
baios> /proje sec muhasebe-2026
baios> bu ay gelen faturaları docs/faturalar-nisan/ içine koydum, kontrol et
  → dosya_oku (PDF) → llm analiz → tutarsızlık uyarısı
  → sql arm → ay toplamı hesapla → rapor.md
baios> şirket X için nisan özeti hazırla
  → veri_analiz skill → outputs/sirket_X_nisan.md
```

**Audit:** Every action is recorded in `~/.baios/audit/` — an answer to the later question of who did what.

---

## ✍️ Content creator — Blog + social posts

**Goal:** A weekly blog post + Twitter/LinkedIn summaries.

**BAIOS setup:**
- Project: `blog-kisilik-gelisimi`
- ARMs: `brave_search`, `web_reader`, `file`, `notion`
- Skills: `arastirma`, `blog_post_taslak`, `url_ozet`, `gorsel_prompt`

**A typical day:**
```
baios> yeni konu: "sabah rutini bilimi"
baios> /skill calistir arastirma konu="sabah rutini bilimi"
  → brave_search + llm + file → docs/arastirma_sabah_rutini.md
baios> bu araştırmadan 1200 kelimelik blog post yaz, okuyucu: girişimci
  → blog_post_taslak skill → outputs/blog_sabah_rutini.md
baios> aynı konu için LinkedIn post taslağı (3 paragraf)
baios> blog'a görsel prompt öner
  → gorsel_prompt skill → dalle ile görsel üret
```

---

## 🔬 Data scientist — CSV exploration + report

**Goal:** Understand a customer segmentation CSV, write first findings, suggest charts.

**BAIOS setup:**
- Project: `musteri-segmentasyon-q2`
- ARMs: `file`, `sql`, `http`
- Skill: `veri_analiz`

**A typical day:**
```
baios> docs/customers.csv yükle
baios> /skill calistir veri_analiz dosya=docs/customers.csv
  → sql arm → temel istatistik
  → llm → bulgu yorumu
  → file → outputs/bulgular.md + grafik_tarif.md
baios> bu bulgulara göre 3 slayt taslağı
baios> /wiki olustur musteri-segmentasyon-bulgular  ← knowledge accumulation
```

---

## 🧑‍💻 Developer — baios.dev dogfood

**Goal:** Manage the baios.dev website through BAIOS itself (the real story of this site).

**BAIOS setup:**
- Project: `baios-dev` (from a template)
- ARMs: `git_ops`, `github`, `deploy`, `browser`, `web_reader`, `file`
- Skills: `landing_copy_revize`, `blog_post_taslak`, `changelog_uret`, `release_notes`, `site_qa`
- Flow: `site_release`

**A typical release:**
```
baios> /proje sec baios-dev
baios> yeni blog: "BAIOS neden ajan değil"
  → blog_post_taslak → outputs/blog_*.md (human approval)
baios> /flow calistir site_release versiyon=v2.6
  → changelog + release_notes → git branch → commit → push → PR aç
baios> PR merge'den sonra /arm deploy trigger main
baios> /arm deploy wait 300
baios> /skill calistir site_qa url=https://baios.dev
```

[Read the detailed story →](../felsefe.html#ajan-değil-katman)

---

## 🎓 Researcher — Source scanning + wiki accumulation

**Goal:** Literature on "artificial intelligence + law" for a doctoral thesis, a continuously growing wiki.

**BAIOS setup:**
- Project: `doktora-tez-ai-hukuk`
- ARMs: `brave_search`, `web_reader`, `file`, `notion`
- Skills: `arastirma`, `url_ozet`
- Automatic wiki generation

**A typical day:**
```
baios> bu akademik makale URL'sini oku ve özetle: https://arxiv.org/abs/...
  → web_reader + llm_ozet → outputs/kaynak_N.md
baios> önemli bulgulardan biri: "AI karar verme şeffaflık sorunu"
  → /wiki olustur ai-karar-seffafligi
baios> geçen ay özetlediğim tüm kaynakları göster
  → file arm → docs/kaynaklar/ listele
baios> ilgili wiki sayfalarını LLM context'e ekle ve tez 3. bölümü için taslak hazırla
```

**The benefit:** Every source is permanently added to your knowledge. A month later, even if the LLM changes, the accumulation is preserved.

---

## The Common Thread: Discipline

In all six scenarios, a different profession, a different job. What's common:
1. **Project** — BAIOS keeps every job alive inside a project.
2. **Discipline** — The working method lives in a file, repeatable.
3. **Approval** — Risky operations ask for approval.
4. **Context** — The LLM always looks at the current state.
5. **Accumulation** — Each project accumulates its own knowledge, the wiki grows.

---

## Your scenario?

[Open your first project with the tutorial →](../kaynaklar/tutorial.html) and set up your own discipline. If you run into trouble, ask from the **omgunbay** chat window at the bottom right.

---

# /en/edge/beta-kayit.html

# Edge Beta

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../edge/beta-kayit.html)

BAIOS Edge is not ready for general release yet, but the **beta program** is opening. If you sign up:

- **First beta notification** — be the first to know when it's ready.
- **Hardware compatibility list** — once it's clear which devices are supported.
- **Prototype updates** — monthly progress summary.
- **Beta participant call** — invitation for pilot use.

---

## Sign-Up

**Email:** edge@baios.dev

Put **"Edge Beta Sign-Up"** in the subject. It speeds things up if you share the following in your message:

- Which hardware you have (Pi 4/5, Jetson, ESP32, robot, etc.)
- The scenario you have in mind (smart home, sensor, robot, maker)
- Contact preference (is email enough, would you join a Telegram/Discord group)

---

## When?

Edge development is active. There's no fixed date, but the targets are:

| Stage | Target |
|---|---|
| Raspberry Pi 4 prototype | 2026 Q3 |
| ESP32 bridge mode | 2026 Q4 |
| Jetson Orin support | 2027 Q1 |
| Pilot with beta participants | 2027 Q1-Q2 |
| General release | After 2027 |

---

## In the Meantime

Individual BAIOS is **stable now** — you can use it on a PC and learn the language discipline while preparing your edge prototype.

[Individual setup →](../bireysel/hizli-baslangic.html) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Scenarios →](../bireysel/senaryolar.html)

---

## Contribute

If you'd like to contribute code / hardware / documentation on the edge side, head to GitHub:

[github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios](https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios)

For edge topics, you can open an issue with the `[edge]` prefix template.

---

# /en/edge/index.html

# Edge

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../edge/index.html)

BAIOS for embedded devices. Core capabilities on resource-constrained hardware.

> **Status:** Coming soon. Active research / early prototyping. Sign up for the beta announcement [here](beta-kayit.html).

---

## Vision

BAIOS is not a PC-only layer. A sensor device squeezed into an ESP32, a robot on a Raspberry Pi, a smart-home controller — all of them speaking with the **same working discipline**.

- **Natural language:** "Open the window if the living-room temperature goes above 25 degrees."
- **Context:** The device knows its own sensors, past values and rule set.
- **Independent:** All LLM calls run locally (small model) or via conditional cloud.
- **Controlled:** Risky actions (start a motor, open a door) go through an approval chain.

---

## Mini-BAIOS Profile

**Architecture:** A subset of full BAIOS — core + a limited ARM set.

**Targeted resources:**
- **ESP32 class:** 8MB flash, 512KB RAM — rule engine + MQTT bridge only, LLM off-device.
- **Raspberry Pi 4 class:** 1GB RAM — core + local 4K LLM + 6-8 ARMs.
- **Jetson Nano / Orin class:** Full BAIOS + large local LLM.

**Selected ARMs (planned):**
- `mqtt` — sensor read/write
- `homeassistant` — smart-home REST
- `http` — general
- `shell` (restricted whitelist)
- `file` (specific directories only)
- `sql` (SQLite sensor logging)
- `rss` (optional)

---

## Use Cases

### Smart-Home Control
Raspberry Pi + Home Assistant bridge. Language-based rules like "When the alarm sounds at 7 AM, open the curtains and start the coffee machine."

### Sensor Data Accumulation
ESP32 cluster → MQTT → Mini-BAIOS → SQLite → daily summary LLM. Every morning, a "yesterday's average humidity/temperature/noise level for the house" report.

### Robot Command Bridge
Robot operating system + BAIOS. The operator gives the command "clean the bottom-left corner of the floor," BAIOS translates the command into ROS messages and performs a risk assessment.

### Maker & Hobby
ESP32 + OLED screen + sensor + BAIOS Mini. Every device at home gets an "explanation" — ask the device, the device answers.

[Detailed examples →](ornekler.html)

---

## What Is Scoped Down, What Is Not

**NOT in Edge BAIOS:**
- Web UI
- 17 channels (most are heavy)
- Full skill/flow engine
- Browser (Playwright)
- Wiki system (may be restricted)

**IN Edge BAIOS:**
- Project + context (light)
- Selected ARMs
- Rule engine
- Approved automation
- MQTT pub/sub integration
- Optional local LLM (small model)

---

## Beta Program

Active prototyping stage. First supported hardware:
- Raspberry Pi 4 / 5
- Jetson Orin Nano
- ESP32 (bridge mode)

**Beta participant profile:**
- Maker, home-automation enthusiast, roboticist
- Has their own hardware
- Open to sharing feedback

[Get the beta announcement →](beta-kayit.html)

---

# /en/edge/ornekler.html

# Edge Examples

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../edge/ornekler.html)

Concrete usage stories — each one different hardware, different work.

---

## 🏠 Smart Home: "Morning Routine"

**Hardware:** Raspberry Pi 4, Home Assistant, Zigbee bridge

**Setup:**
- Project: `ev`
- ARM: `homeassistant`, `calendar`, `mqtt`
- Automation: "Morning alarm" + "evening lock-down"

**Rule (natural language):**
```
every weekday at 7:00 AM:
  1. open the bedroom curtain
  2. start the coffee machine (if the water level is above 30%)
  3. tell me today's weather and calendar summary
```

**How BAIOS does it:**
- Cron triggers → homeassistant (curtain) → homeassistant (coffee + sensor) → weather + calendar → TTS

**Why BAIOS:** Everything from one place, in the same language. If it breaks, change the command, don't write code.

---

## 📊 Sensor Data: "Home Health Summary"

**Hardware:** 5× ESP32 sensors (temperature, humidity, sound, CO2, light) + Raspberry Pi 4 brain

**Setup:**
- The ESP32s publish to MQTT (values per second)
- Mini-BAIOS on the Pi listens to MQTT
- Logs to SQLite
- Every morning at 8:00 a daily summary goes to the LLM

**Sample report:**
> "Last night the CO2 level in the living room rose to 1400 ppm (03:00-05:00). In the bedroom, noise stayed above 45dB for 2 hours. My suggestion: open the ventilation for 15 min at 22:00 in the evening."

**BAIOS skill:** `sensor_gun_ozet` (custom for edge)

---

## 🤖 Robot: "Room-Cleaning Commands"

**Hardware:** Jetson Orin Nano + LIDAR + ROS 2

**Setup:**
- The operator gives a voice command
- BAIOS STT → intent analysis → ROS 2 goal message
- Risk check (is there anything breakable, is the charge enough)
- Action → logged to audit

**Sample command:**
```
operator: "start from the right side of the kitchen, move to the living room within 20 minutes"
BAIOS: 
  - rota_planla(start="mutfak_sag", end="salon", sure=20dk)
  - charge=85% → OK
  - breakable_item detected → "caution: vase x=3.2 y=1.8"
  - approve? → operator OK
  - ROS goal publish
```

---

## 🔧 Maker: "Talking Aquarium"

**Hardware:** ESP32 + OLED + temperature/pH sensor + Mini-BAIOS (on a Pi Zero)

**Setup:**
- Reads the aquarium sensors
- The Mini-BAIOS on the Pi Zero knows the species of the user's fish and their care rules
- Email/Telegram on anomaly

**User chat (from the phone):**
```
user: "how's the water today?"
BAIOS: "Temperature 24.8°C (ideal 24-26), pH 7.2 (ideal 7.0-7.5). 
       The nitrite level rose to 0.1 yesterday, today it's 0 — good. 
       You haven't changed the feed for 3 days, shall I remind you?"
```

---

## 🚗 Driver Assistant (in-vehicle)

**Hardware:** Jetson Nano + CAN-bus adapter + microphone + speaker

**Setup:**
- Access to vehicle sensors (fuel, engine temperature, speed)
- BAIOS talks to the driver in natural language
- Traffic data (offline map data) + weather

**Scenario:**
```
user: "is there enough fuel to get home?"
BAIOS: "Yes, ~280 km with the remaining fuel. Home is 95 km away. 
       There are 2 gas stations on the way, no need. 
       The weather is turning — rain starts in 35 min, take care."
```

---

## ⚙️ Industrial: Machine Maintenance Prediction

**Hardware:** Factory machine PLC + Modbus gateway + Raspberry Pi cluster + Mini-BAIOS

**Setup:**
- PLC sensor data → MQTT
- BAIOS hourly anomaly detection (simple ML)
- Telegram notification + file log to the maintenance engineer

**User:**
```
engineer: "how has machine 3 been over the last week?"
BAIOS: "Vibration rose 18% in week 3. In the last 24 hours the local peak 
       is 32%. If this trend continues, the bearing will need 
       replacing within 9-12 days. Shall I check if there's a spare in stock?"
```

---

## Common Feature: All the Same BAIOS

In all six scenarios the **same core** runs:
- Project discipline
- Context layers
- Approval chain
- Audit log

The only difference is **which ARMs are active** and **where the LLM runs** (local vs cloud).

---

## Join the Beta

If you want to set up one of the scenarios above:
[Get the beta announcement →](beta-kayit.html)

---

# /en/entegrasyon/index.html

# Integration Philosophy

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../entegrasyon/index.html)

BAIOS does not integrate everything. That is not a shortcoming — it is a deliberate choice.

The principles behind how we handle the connections that touch your business.

---

## 1. Just Tell It

You don't decide how each connection gets built. You **say what you want**, and BAIOS picks the right path.

You say "I want to see my invoices." BAIOS checks whether a trusted path we have prepared exists; if it does, it sets that up. If it doesn't, it prepares a flow made just for you — and it tells you plainly which path it chose and why.

You never make a technical decision. One sentence is enough.

## 2. Two Kinds of Connections

In BAIOS, connections come in two forms:

**Ready modules.** The connections that touch your money, your customers, your legal records — accounting, invoicing, collections, official correspondence. We are preparing these, and will test and maintain them; we design them around KVKK. You only connect.

> These modules are **in the preparation stage.** The first connection (Logo İşbaşı) is being tested; the rest will roll out in turn.

**Made-for-you flows.** When you have a niche need that isn't on the list, BAIOS prepares it for you — on your own machine, under your own control. You don't have to wait.

You never choose between the two; BAIOS picks the right one based on the nature of the work.

## 3. Why We Don't Integrate Everything

We never present anything as "ready" that we cannot stand behind.

Our ready modules are **few and carefully made.** We treat every connection that touches your business with care. Trusted connections instead of thousands of shallow ones.

This is not "more is better"; it is **"more trustworthy is better."**

## 4. No Free Rein on Risky Work

We do not let the AI build the connections that touch your money, your customers, and your legal records on its own.

Connections like these — issuing an invoice, taking a payment, sending official correspondence — run through modules that we **prepare in advance and design to be auditable.** Where the outcome cannot be undone and carries legal weight, there is no room for guesswork.

This is not a limitation — it is **care.** If the work is serious, it is taken seriously.

## 5. Why This Choice?

For every connection, BAIOS shows you which path it took and why.

When it prepares something for you, it shows what it is about to do step by step, in plain language, before it runs; you see it, you approve it, then it runs. No black box — **every step is visible, and you can object to any of them.**

## 6. Own It

Your connections run on your machine, with your keys, under your control.

- Your data stays with you.
- A connection is set up once, then runs by the rules.
- Even if you leave BAIOS one day, the setup you built is yours.

**Author once, run forever — own it, don't rent it.**

---

## A Layer That Works Beside You

This approach follows naturally from [our philosophy](../../felsefe.html). BAIOS does not act in your place; it works beside you, transparently and in a way you can undo. Integrations are the same: not fast but **trustworthy**, not many but **carefully made**, not ours but **under your control**.

[Read the philosophy →](../../felsefe.html) · [Capability catalog →](../../katalog.html)

---

# /en/felsefe.html

# Philosophy

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../felsefe.html)

Five principles that describe not what BAIOS is, but **how it behaves**.

---

## 1. Language First

You write or say what you want. BAIOS understands and does it.

No commands to memorize — natural communication is the goal. Shortcuts (`/projects`, `/skill ...`) exist but are **not required**. You can do the same thing by writing "email Ahmet" or with the `/mail send Ahmet` command. BAIOS turns both into the same working language.

## 2. No Action Without Approval

No risky operation happens without your approval.

- Deleting or overwriting files
- Deploy, build, triggering a remote server
- API calls (paid ones especially)
- Commit, push, PR merge

Before every operation a **proposal** is shown; you approve, BAIOS acts, the result is recorded. In approved automations (pull a report every morning, back up every evening), if the risk level is low it does not ask again — **decided once, runs by the rules**.

## 3. Simplicity

- Solve instead of asking the user. Take the information from context.
- Give a 5-line answer, not 50 lines of markdown.
- Risk tables, semantic boundaries, proposal formats — these are used **only for genuinely risky** operations (deleting files, deploy). Do not use them for information questions.
- Do not write "no actionable step." If there is no action, move on quietly.
- Don't offer A/B/C choices unless truly necessary — suggest the best one directly.

## 4. Context Is Everything

BAIOS does not depend on what the model you're talking to happens to know. **BAIOS builds the context on every conversation** and injects it into the model.

- **System layer:** BAIOS version, available ARMs, skills, flows, user identity.
- **Project layer:** Active project, project files, project discipline, connected components.
- **Temporary layer:** Recent operations, the last five minutes of work.
- **Wiki layer:** Knowledge-base pages relevant to the query.

Even if the model changes, the context is preserved — **even switching from OpenAI to Ollama, the conversation continues where it left off**.

## 5. Model Independence

BAIOS works with any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, local Ollama, MiniMax, others.

- The model is only a **tool**. BAIOS's structure is independent of it.
- If a provider fails, the **fallback chain** automatically moves to the next.
- Cost-sensitive? Cheap model. Sensitive data? Local — the choice is yours.
- One command: `baios config set llm.provider ollama`

---

## A Layer, Not a Black Box

BAIOS does not say *"leave it to me and it'll get done."* It is **a discipline that works beside you**. You think; BAIOS produces a recorded, repeatable, auditable version of your thinking.

Why this difference matters:
- When something acts in your place and errs, it's hard to undo.
- When a layer errs, it can be undone step by step.
- A black box hides its reasoning.
- A layer is transparent — you see every step, and you can object to every step.

---

## Three Users, Three Layers

- **Individual:** One user, one machine. Early access; with personas built for your profession (lawyer, accountant, SMB owner, researcher…).
- **Enterprise (team / RBAC / audit):** Teams, roles, audit, multi-tenant. **Planned after the SMB release.** [Get in touch](../kurumsal/iletisim.html).
- **Edge:** ESP32, Raspberry Pi, embedded devices. Limited core. Coming soon.

[Read the architecture →](mimari.html)

---

# /en/gizlilik.html

# Privacy & Terms

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../gizlilik.html)

Last updated: 2026-06-04 · Early version.

---

## Data Controller

baios.dev is operated by İlker Bayraktar. Contact: **[email protected]**
(Contact and KVKK requests go to this address.)

## Cookies and Tracking

**This site uses no cookies and runs no analytics/tracking.** No advertising or
profiling data is collected during your visit. Server access logs (IP, date) may
be kept only for security and technical operation.

## Personal Data We Process

We only process data you **send us yourself**:

- **Contact / early-test inquiry:** When you email us, your address and message
  are processed to answer your request (KVKK art. 5/2-c and 5/2-f).

## Logo İşbaşı Connection (SSO)

The `baios.dev/entegrasyon/isbasi/callback/` page receives the `code` returned
from Logo İşbaşı authorization **only in your browser** and forwards it to the
**BAIOS running locally on your own computer**. **This data is not stored, logged,
or shared with third parties on baios.dev servers.** Access to your İşbaşı account
happens on your machine, with your key; you are the data controller of your own data.

## Your KVKK Rights (art. 11)

You can exercise your rights to access, correct, delete, and object to processing
of your personal data via **[email protected]**.

## Terms of Use & Disclaimer

- BAIOS is an **early version**; features are under development and may change.
- BAIOS outputs (summaries, drafts, analyses, calculations) are **informational**;
  they do not replace legal, financial, or accounting advice. Consult a qualified
  professional before any use with legal or financial consequences.
- The software is provided "as is"; use is at the user's own responsibility.

## Open Source

BAIOS is open source [on GitHub under MIT](https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios).

[Home →](index.html)

---

# /en/index.html

<div class="hero">
<h1>BAIOS</h1>
<p><strong>A controlled working discipline that runs in human language, model-independent.</strong></p>
<p>🇹🇷 <a href="../index.html">Türkçe</a></p>
<p>We used to have notebooks, pens, and tools on our desk. Then came folders and windows. Now, with AI, a new working desk is taking shape — and at this desk we finally speak the same language. BAIOS is not a doer that runs off on its own; it is a layer that works between the model and the human, carrying out controlled, recorded, and reversible actions.</p>
<p><strong>An assistant built for your profession — KVKK-compliant, your data stays with you.</strong> From lawyers to accountants, SMB owners to researchers — everyone's work is different; BAIOS works with each in their own language.</p>
<p>Not a rival to Anthropic Claude, a partner-compatible <strong>complement</strong>. Author once, run forever — <strong>own it, don't rent it.</strong></p>
</div>

## Core Principles

- **Language first** — No commands to memorize. Write or say what you want; BAIOS understands.
- **No action without approval** — Deleting files, deploy, API calls… all ask for your approval.
- **Simplicity** — A 5-line answer, not 50.
- **Context is everything** — User, project, files, wiki knowledge — all sent to the model automatically.
- **Model independence** — OpenAI, Anthropic, local Ollama. BAIOS is independent of the model.

[Read the philosophy in detail →](felsefe.html) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Architecture →](mimari.html)

---

## Who Is It For?

Whatever your profession, BAIOS comes tailored to that work — each persona with its own sector templates, KVKK-compliant, your data stays with you.

- ⚖️ **Lawyer** — case file analysis, petition drafts, legislation research
- 📊 **Accountant** — monthly close, VAT return preparation
- 🏷️ **SMB owner** — campaign plan, stock notes, customer follow-up
- 🌍 **Exporter** — customs declarations, FX tracking
- 💎 **Jeweler / retailer** — inventory management, customer loyalty
- ✍️ **Content creator** — blog plan, article drafts
- 🔬 **Researcher** — literature summaries, citation management
- 📈 **Data analyst** — CSV → statistics → report
- 💻 **Developer** — feature/bugfix flow, repo documentation
- 📚 **Writer / teacher** — outlines, summaries, lesson material

> Outputs are for informational purposes; uses with financial/legal consequences require expert review ([Privacy & Terms](gizlilik.html)).

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1.5rem 0;">
<a href="#install" class="cta">Early Access — GitHub</a>
</div>

**Roadmap:** team/enterprise (multi-user, RBAC, audit) and edge versions are planned **after the SMB release**. [Get in touch](../kurumsal/iletisim.html).

---

<a name="install"></a>
## Individual Setup

```bash
# Early version — install from GitHub (PyPI release coming soon)
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios && ./run.sh start
```

Terminal, web UI, or Telegram/Discord/Slack — whichever you prefer.

```
baios> /projects
baios> /skill run research
baios> weather in istanbul
baios> /wiki create customer analysis
```

[Tutorial — your first project in 10 minutes →](../kaynaklar/tutorial.html)

---

## How Does BAIOS Work?

**Project discipline:** Each project lives with its own context, materials, and connected ARMs/skills. BAIOS knows the project's structure and suggests smart actions.

**Components:**
- **ARM** — Adapters that connect to the outside world (Gmail, GitHub, files, shell…)
- **Skill** — Repeatable workflow templates (research → summarize → save)
- **Flow** — Large flows with conditions, loops, multiple skills
- **Automation** — Scheduled or triggered tasks
- **MCP** — BAIOS is both an MCP server and client (connects to any MCP server)

[Read the architecture in detail →](mimari.html) &nbsp;&nbsp; [Ready component catalog →](../katalog.html)

---

## Real Usage Scenarios

[Scenarios →](../bireysel/senaryolar.html)

---

## Open & Transparent

- **MIT License** — [Source code on GitHub](https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios)
- **Automated tests on every commit**
- **Turkish documentation**
- **baios.dev itself is run with BAIOS** — dogfood

<div style="text-align:center;margin:2rem 0;">
<a href="../kaynaklar/tutorial.html" class="cta">Get Started</a>
&nbsp;
<a href="https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios" class="cta-secondary">GitHub</a>
</div>

<strong>Need help?</strong> Use the <em>omgunbay</em> chat window at the bottom right to ask anything about BAIOS.
</div>

# /en/katalog.html

# Catalog

The components BAIOS offers. New components are added through the community store.

## Turkish SMB Integrations

<!-- AUTO:connectors START -->

|---|---|---|
| **Logo İşbaşı** | Muhasebe / e-Fatura | ◷ First connection (testing) |

---

## ARM — Adapters

### API-Based

| ARM | What It Does | Setup |
|---|---|---|
| brave_search | Web search (Brave Search API) | API key |
| weather | Weather (OpenWeatherMap) | API key |
| dalle | Image generation (OpenAI DALL-E) | API key |
| deepl | Translation (DeepL) | API key |
| youtube | Video search (YouTube Data) | API key |
| telegram | Telegram bot messaging | Bot token |
| gmail | Read Gmail (IMAP) | OAuth |
| gmail_read | Gmail read alias (→ gmail) | OAuth |
| gmail_send | Send Gmail | App password |
| whatsapp | WhatsApp (Twilio) | Twilio token |
| notion | Notion page/db | Token |
| github | Issue + PR management | Token |
| homeassistant | Smart-home REST API | Token + URL |
| deploy | GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch | Token + repo |
| tts_openai | OpenAI TTS (6 voices) | API key |
| tts_elevenlabs | ElevenLabs premium TTS | API key |
| stt_whisper | OpenAI Whisper API transcription | API key |

### Local

| ARM | What It Does | Risk |
|---|---|---|
| file | Full file CRUD (read/write/delete/move/copy) | Low |
| dosya_oku | Read-only (PDF/MD/TXT/CSV) | Low |
| shell | Controlled command (whitelist) | **High** |
| git_ops | Sandboxed git (status/diff/commit/push opt-in) | Medium |
| browser | Playwright (navigate/screenshot/PDF) | Medium |
| web_reader | URL → clean markdown (Jina Reader) | Low |
| http | GET/POST/PUT/DELETE + headers + body | Low |
| calendar | Local JSON calendar (de-dup + Turkish month parsing) | Low |
| sql | SQLite / PostgreSQL / MySQL queries | Low |
| mqtt | MQTT sensor read/write | Low |
| cloud | S3 + Google Drive | Low |
| rss | Read RSS/Atom feeds | Low |
| llm_ozet | Summarize with the model (model-agnostic) | Low |
| obsidian | Local Obsidian vault (read/write/search/backlinks) | Low |
| tts_edge | Microsoft Edge TTS (free cloud, Turkish) | Low |
| tts_browser | Web Speech API bridge (client-side) | Low |
| tts_piper | Piper TTS (local, ONNX — model download) | Medium |
| stt_browser | Web Speech Recognition bridge | Low |
| stt_faster_whisper | faster-whisper local STT (CTranslate2) | Medium |
| feedback | User feedback | Low |

---

---

## Skill — Repeatable Workflows

### Content Creation
- **arastirma** — search a topic on the web → summarize with the model → save
- **blog_taslak** — topic + audience → 800–1200 word draft
- **blog_post_taslak** — (SM5) a more refined blog draft
- **icerik_uretim** — multi-step content creation
- **landing_copy_revize** — revise landing copy for the audience
- **url_ozet** — URL → markdown → summary
- **gorsel_prompt** — generate an image prompt for DALL-E

### Professional Work
- **muhasebe** — invoice/CSV → analysis → report
- **fatura_olustur** — line items → invoice PDF
- **harcama_takip** — add an expense item + category
- **veri_analiz** — read CSV → basic statistics → chart description
- **rakip_izleme** — competitor site → change detection
- **fiyat_takip** — URL list → track prices → alert

### Daily
- **haber_ozet** — RSS/feed → model summary → email
- **gunluk_ozet** — summarize the day's emails/messages
- **toplanti_ozet** — summarize a transcript
- **takip_mail** — customer → follow-up email draft
- **ilac_hatirlatma** — timed reminder
- **dosya_organize** — organize a folder by type

### Developer / Education
- **flashcard** — text → Anki card set
- **konu_aciklama** — topic → graded explanation
- **git_changelog** — git log → user-friendly change list

### baios.dev (SM5)
- **site_qa** — website quality check (SEO, links, screenshots)
- **changelog_uret** — commit range → Turkish changelog
- **release_notes** — version → release notes

---

## Flow — Large Multi-Skill Flows

| Flow | What It Does |
|---|---|
| **avukat_dosya** | Scan power of attorney → analyze the case file → search legislation → draft a petition |
| **muhasebe_kontrol** | Invoice/CSV → consistency check → alert |
| **site_release** | (SM7) changelog → release notes → branch → commit → push → PR → QA |

---

## Model Provider — 4

| Provider | Models | Use |
|---|---|---|
| **OpenAI** | GPT-4/4o/5/mini | General purpose |
| **Anthropic** | Claude Opus / Sonnet | Long context, detailed analysis |
| **Local** (Ollama) | Llama 3, Mistral, Qwen | Privacy, offline |
| **Local_4K** | Short-context local models | Low RAM |

Switch with one command: `baios config set llm.provider <name>`.

---

## Community Store

A community store — skill/ARM/flow/automation definitions added by users. Browse with `/store`, install with `/store install <name>`.

> Core ARMs + optional extra components from the community store. Current counts above (from the live codebase).

---

## Want to Add a Component?

- **Write a skill JSON** — build your own workflow in 10 minutes. [Guide](../kaynaklar/gelistiriciler.html)
- **Write an ARM in Python** — a handler for a new integration. [Guide](../kaynaklar/gelistiriciler.html)
- **Add an MCP server** — BAIOS turns that MCP into an ARM automatically. [Guide](../kaynaklar/mcp-rehberi.html)
- **Open a PR** — contribute to the community store. [GitHub](https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios)

---

# /en/kaynaklar/gelistiriciler.html

# For Developers

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../kaynaklar/gelistiriciler.html)

If you want to contribute to BAIOS or write your own enterprise component, this is the place.

---

## Get the Code

```bash
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios
pip install -e .
python -m pytest tests/ -q    # test baseline 1025+
./run.sh start                # web UI
```

**Python:** 3.12+

**Development environment:** Linux / macOS (Windows: WSL recommended).

---

## Directory Structure

```
baios/
├── baios/
│   ├── arm/             ← 28 ARM handler + catalog + builder
│   ├── skills/          ← skill engine + templates + flows
│   ├── project/         ← project management + discipline engine
│   ├── web/             ← FastAPI backend + routers
│   ├── wiki/            ← wiki system (system + project)
│   ├── automation/      ← scheduler + trigger engine
│   ├── notification/    ← 17 channels
│   ├── context.py       ← LLM context builder
│   └── llm.py           ← provider-agnostic LLM wrapper
├── frontend/            ← React (Vite) web UI
├── site/                ← baios.dev static
├── tests/               ← 1025+ tests
├── agents/              ← BKS, PROJE_PLANI, DEGISIKLIK_YONETIMI
└── scripts/             ← impact_check, drift_check, sm8_dogfood
```

---

## Write a New Skill

**1. Create a JSON file:**

`baios/skills/templates/ornek_skill.json`

```json
{
  "name": "ornek_skill",
  "label": "Örnek Skill",
  "description": "Konuyu araştırır + özetler + dosyaya kaydeder.",
  "category": "arastirma",
  "required_arms": ["brave_search"],
  "input_params": ["konu"],
  "steps": [
    {
      "action": "arm:brave_search",
      "params": {"query": "{konu}"},
      "description": "Web arama"
    },
    {
      "action": "llm:Sonuçları 5 maddede Türkçe özetle.",
      "use_previous": true,
      "description": "LLM özet"
    },
    {
      "action": "file:outputs/ornek_{konu}.md",
      "use_previous": true,
      "description": "Kaydet"
    }
  ]
}
```

**2. Test it:**

```bash
python -m pytest tests/test_site_qa_skill.py -v  # structural test example
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/skills/ornek_skill/run \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
     -d '{"params":{"konu":"python test patterns"}, "project":"denemem"}'
```

**3. Update the docs:**
- Add to the skill list in `agents/EZME_KORUMA.md`
- Update the skill count in `PROJE_PLANI.md`

**Step types:**
- `arm:<name>` — run an ARM (config comes from the ARM's own setup)
- `llm:<prompt>` — process with the LLM (use `use_previous: true` to append the previous output to the prompt)
- `file:<path>` — save (if the path is in a project context it goes to project/outputs)
- `skill:<name>` — call another skill

**Parameters:** placeholders like `{konu}`. They are cleaned up in file names (slugify).

---

## Write a New ARM

**Fast path: Builder endpoint (SM1.5):**

```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/arms/create \
     -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
     -d '{
       "name": "my_arm",
       "label": "My ARM",
       "description": "My custom ARM",
       "type": "local",
       "install_level": 0
     }'
```

This does three things:
- Creates a `baios/arm/my_arm_arm.py` stub handler
- Adds a record to `baios/arm/catalog.json`
- Adds a register block to `baios/arm/handlers.py`
- Registers it in the live `_HANDLERS` dict (no restart needed)

**Fill in the stub:**

```python
# baios/arm/my_arm_arm.py

def handle_my_arm(action: str, config: dict, query: str):
    from baios.arm.handlers import HandlerResult
    
    # action: "search", "create", "list" etc. — determined in the skill template
    # config: contents of ~/.baios/arm_configs/my_arm.json
    # query: user question
    
    if action == "search":
        result = f"Aradığın: {query}"
        return HandlerResult(True, result)
    
    return HandlerResult(False, "", f"Bilinmeyen aksiyon: {action}")
```

**Write a test:**

```python
# tests/test_my_arm.py
def test_my_arm_search():
    from baios.arm.handlers import execute_arm
    r = execute_arm("my_arm", "search", {}, "test")
    assert r.success is True
```

---

## Write a New Flow

A flow runs multiple skills/ARMs conditionally.

`baios/skills/flows/my_flow.json`

```json
{
  "name": "my_flow",
  "description": "Önce araştır, sonra blog yaz, sonra QA yap",
  "steps": [
    {
      "id": "s1",
      "type": "skill",
      "skill_name": "arastirma",
      "params": {"konu": "{konu}"},
      "save_as": "rapor"
    },
    {
      "id": "s2",
      "type": "skill",
      "skill_name": "blog_post_taslak",
      "params": {"konu": "{konu}", "okuyucu": "genel"},
      "save_as": "blog"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Conditional step:**

```json
{
  "id": "kontrol",
  "type": "condition",
  "condition": "Blog taslak kalitesi yeterli mi? {blog}",
  "if_true": "yayinla",
  "if_false": "yeniden_yaz"
}
```

---

## Change Management (P12)

Before every commit:

```bash
python3 scripts/impact_check.py      # impact of changed files
python3 scripts/drift_check.py       # doc consistency
python -m pytest tests/ -q           # full test run
```

Critical rules (`agents/DEGISIKLIK_YONETIMI.md`):
- ARM added → update the count in 4 test files + EZME + PLAN
- Skill added → test_e2e_full_flow + EZME
- Endpoint added → Pydantic validation required + test

---

## Opening a PR

1. Branch: `feat/skill-ornek` or `fix/arm-bug-123`
2. Commit format: `feat: <CycleID> — <description>` (CycleID is in BKS)
3. `python3 scripts/drift_check.py` must be clean
4. Tests: `0 fail` required (flake is an exception, record it in `agents/cycle_active.md`)
5. Open the PR: `gh pr create` or GitHub UI
6. Maintainer review
7. Merge

---

## Contribution Ideas

- A new channel (there are 17 today — you could be the 18th)
- A new ARM (which service is missing?)
- A skill pack (industry-specific — health, education, law)
- A wiki module (under `baios/wiki/`)
- An edge prototype (Pi/ESP32)
- Frontend improvement (React)
- Channel tests (E2E)
- Documentation (Turkish → English translation)

---

## Help

- **GitHub Issues:** [github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios/issues](https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios/issues)
- **Discussions:** coming soon
- **omgunbay chatbot:** RAG over the BAIOS documentation, button at the bottom right.

---

# /en/kaynaklar/mcp-rehberi.html

# MCP — Model Context Protocol

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../kaynaklar/mcp-rehberi.html)

BAIOS is both an **MCP server** and an **MCP client**. What does that mean, and what is it good for?

---

## What Is MCP?

Model Context Protocol — a protocol proposed by Anthropic that lets LLM tools do server-client communication in a **standardized way**.

**A simple analogy:**
- Ethernet connects devices physically.
- HTTP makes software talk over the web.
- MCP makes LLM applications talk to tools/data over the **same protocol**.

**Result:** Whoever writes an MCP server (Slack, Jira, Figma) makes it usable by every MCP-compatible application (Claude Desktop, VS Code, BAIOS). Many MCP servers are already available, and the number grows every day.

---

## BAIOS's MCP Role

### As a server

BAIOS exposes itself like an MCP server — **other tools from outside can reach BAIOS's ARMs/Skills/Flows.**

**Scenario:**
- From Claude Desktop you say "open a PR in İlker's baios-dev project"
- Claude Desktop connects to BAIOS's MCP server
- BAIOS's `github` ARM runs → the PR is opened

### As a client

BAIOS connects to external MCP servers. When you add an MCP server, that tool **automatically becomes an ARM**.

**Scenario:**
- You add the Figma MCP server (`npx @figma/mcp-server`)
- BAIOS detects it → the `figma` ARM appears on its own (as `api_figma`)
- You can use `arm:api_figma` in your skills

---

## Current Status

| Capability | Status |
|---|---|
| BAIOS MCP server (exposed outward) | ✅ Basic |
| BAIOS MCP client (discovers external MCPs) | ✅ Phase 12 |
| Auto ARM (MCP → ARM conversion) | ✅ |
| MCP discovery | ✅ |
| Official MCP compatibility certificate | Planned |

---

## Adding an MCP Server

### 1. Install the MCP server

Each MCP server has its own documentation. Example — GitHub MCP:

```bash
npm install -g @modelcontextprotocol/server-github
```

### 2. Register it with BAIOS

**Web UI:** Settings → MCP Servers → **Add**

**CLI:**
```bash
baios> /mcp ekle github-resmi "npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github" stdio
  Environment variable:
  GITHUB_TOKEN=ghp_...
```

### 3. See it as an ARM

```bash
baios> /arm listele
# api_github_resmi — Auto ARM (MCP: github-resmi)
```

Now you can use it in your skills:
```json
{
  "action": "arm:api_github_resmi",
  "params": {"query": "list my repositories"}
}
```

---

## Popular MCP Servers

> Compatibility testing is ongoing. The set fully tested at 100% is currently limited; **try the ones below with confidence**:

- **filesystem** — local file operations (a complement to BAIOS's own `file` ARM)
- **github** — GitHub API
- **slack** — Slack workspace
- **google-drive** — GDrive
- **postgres** — PostgreSQL
- **brave-search** — web search
- **puppeteer** — web scraping

Up-to-date list: [modelcontextprotocol.io/servers](https://modelcontextprotocol.io)

---

## Use BAIOS From Outside

Add BAIOS to Claude Desktop as an MCP server:

**1. Start BAIOS MCP server mode:**
```bash
baios mcp-server --port 7777
```

**2. In Claude Desktop config:**
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "baios": {
      "command": "baios",
      "args": ["mcp-server", "--stdio"]
    }
  }
}
```

**3. In Claude Desktop:**
```
Can you summarize the last 10 commits in the baios-dev project for me?
→ Claude uses BAIOS's git_ops ARM
```

---

## Security

- MCP servers run **locally** (stdio) or over TLS.
- BAIOS routes MCP calls through the same approval chain (risky operation → approval).
- The audit log records both the request coming from MCP and BAIOS's response.
- A malicious MCP server? On the BAIOS side, **only permitted actions** get through.

---

## Contributing

If you wrote your own MCP server and want a BAIOS compatibility test:
- **GitHub Issue:** open it with the `[mcp-compat]` label
- Share an example configuration + a few test commands
- We add the test result to the repo

---

## Related

- [Catalog — Auto ARM section](../katalog.html)
- [Developer guide](gelistiriciler.html)
- [Architecture — MCP section](../mimari.html#mcp)

---

# /en/kaynaklar/omgunbay.html

# omgunbay

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../kaynaklar/omgunbay.html)

The answer to **"What happens if you ask BAIOS about BAIOS?"**

---

## What Is It?

omgunbay — the official BAIOS chatbot. It works with RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) over all BAIOS documentation (BKS, PROJE_PLANI, BAIOS_PRINCIPLES, tutorial, resources).

**In plain words:** ask anything about BAIOS, and it looks at the written documents and answers. It does not make things up; when it does not know, it says "I don't know."

---

## Where Can I Find It?

### 1. The chat window at the bottom right of baios.dev

On every page of this site (very soon) — open the chat button at the bottom right and start. No sign-up required.

### 2. Telegram

`@omgunbay_bot` — start the conversation on Telegram with /start.

### 3. Inside BAIOS

In your own BAIOS installation:
```
baios> /chat omgunbay "yeni skill nasıl yazılır?"
```

---

## How Does It Work?

**Knowledge base:**
- `BAIOS_PRINCIPLES.md` — philosophy, principles
- `PROJE_PLANI.md` — roadmap, phase plans
- `agents/BKS.md` — version, status
- `site/docs/*` — this site itself
- `baios_bireysel_cli_tutorial.md` — CLI tutorial
- Source code comments (partial)

**Process:**
1. Converts your question into an embedding
2. Finds the most relevant passages in the knowledge base
3. Tells the LLM "answer based on these passages"
4. States which source it drew on in the answer

**Assurance:**
- Says "I don't know" for topics outside the knowledge base
- Cites sources
- The answer is verifiable

---

## What Can You Ask?

### Getting started
- "What is BAIOS, what is it for?"
- "Which LLMs does it support?"
- "What would my first project look like?"

### Technical
- "What is the difference between a skill and a flow?"
- "What does ARM install_level 0 mean?"
- "What are the context layers, in order?"

### Usage
- "Which skills should I use as a blog writer?"
- "How do I set up OAuth for the Gmail ARM?"
- "How do I stop an automation?"

### Contributing
- "How do I write my own ARM?"
- "What is the PR process?"
- "How do I run the tests?"

---

## What It Does Not Do

- **It does not analyze project data** — it only talks about BAIOS.
- **It does not give live weather / news** — the knowledge base is static.
- **It does not store conversation history** (optional — can be stored in enterprise mode).
- **It does not take action** — it only gives a written answer. You cannot say "open a PR"; you need to go to the BAIOS CLI/web for that.

---

## Feedback

If omgunbay gives a wrong answer:
- The **👎** button inside the chat
- GitHub issue: `[omgunbay]` label
- What the correct answer should have been — write it, so the knowledge base gets updated

---

## Developer Note

The omgunbay source code is in `baios/omgunbay.py`. It is a simple RAG implementation — it is re-indexed when the knowledge base is refreshed.

**Extending the knowledge base:** When you add a new tutorial or a new document, the index is updated with `baios omgunbay rebuild`.

---

# /en/kaynaklar/sss.html

# FAQ

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../kaynaklar/sss.html)

Here we briefly gather what is already in the documentation. For a deeper answer, follow the link to the relevant page.

---

## Basics

**What is BAIOS, in one sentence?**
A controlled work discipline that runs in human language and is LLM-independent.

**Is it an assistant that acts on its own?**
No. BAIOS is a layer — you do the thinking, BAIOS applies it with discipline. [Details](../felsefe.html#ajan-değil-katman)

**Is it paid?**
MIT license, free and open source. LLM calls may be paid depending on the provider (OpenAI/Anthropic). If you use local Ollama, there is no charge at all.

**Turkish or English?**
Both. Documentation is Turkish-first; in-code messages are mostly Turkish. The i18n infrastructure is ready.

---

## Installation

**How do I install it?**
```bash
# early version — from GitHub (PyPI release coming soon)
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios && ./run.sh start
```
[Tutorial](tutorial.html)

**Does it work on Windows?**
We recommend WSL2. Pure Windows paths are not tested; please report issues.

**Python version?**
3.12+.

**Is Ollama required?**
No. If you have an OpenAI/Anthropic API key, that is enough. Ollama is only for a local LLM.

---

## Project & Discipline

**What is a project?**
A purpose-oriented set of files + context + a connected collection of ARMs/Skills. It lives in the `~/.baios/projects/<slug>/` directory. [Architecture](../mimari.html#proje-disiplini)

**How many projects can I have?**
No limit. You can open hundreds of projects.

**Can I move a project?**
Yes — `baios proje export <slug>` produces a ZIP, which can be loaded on another machine with `baios proje import`.

**Is project discipline mandatory?**
No, it is optional. But very useful — the LLM's suggestions to you become project-specific.

---

## ARM & Skill

**What is an ARM?**
An adapter — the Python module that connects BAIOS to external services (Gmail, GitHub, file, shell). [Catalog](../katalog.html#arm--28-adaptör)

**How many ARMs are there?**
28 core + 8 optional in the community store.

**Difference between a skill and an ARM?**
- **ARM:** does a single job (one API call, one file operation)
- **Skill:** a template that combines multiple steps

**How do I write my own skill?**
With a JSON file. [Developer guide](gelistiriciler.html#yeni-skill-yaz)

**Can I give my skill JSON to a friend?**
Yes — a single file, copy-paste and it works. You can also upload it to the community store.

---

## LLM

**Which LLMs are supported?**
OpenAI (GPT-4/4o/5), Anthropic (Claude Opus/Sonnet), Ollama (Llama 3, Mistral, Qwen), Local_4K (small models).

**Switching providers?**
```bash
baios config set llm.provider anthropic
```
The conversation continues from where it left off — the context is preserved.

**Does the LLM have a hallucination problem?**
BAIOS's current capabilities are injected into the context (SM-FIX1). The LLM won't say "this skill doesn't exist" — it knows whether it is in the list or not. Even so, human approval is taken on every important output.

**What is fallback?**
If the priority provider goes down, the next one is tried. Uninterrupted service.

---

## Data & Privacy

**Where is my data?**
Local: `~/.baios/`. It goes to an external service only at the moment of an LLM call (to OpenAI if you chose OpenAI).

**Is there a BAIOS server, does it take my data?**
**No.** BAIOS is entirely local. Telemetry is optional and off by default.

**Are my API keys safe?**
Encrypted in the vault with Fernet + PBKDF2. The master password is yours.

**Would it accidentally run `rm -rf`?**
No. The shell ARM uses an allowlist; `rm` is on the blocklist. In general, the rule is "no risky action without approval."

---

## Automation

**Is it like cron?**
Yes + more. Time, webhook, file change, RSS, MQTT — all can be triggers.

**What if there is an error?**
Every run is recorded in the audit. If there is an error, an email/Telegram notification (configurable).

**Stop an automation?**
```
baios> /otomasyon durdur <ad>
```

---

## Integration

**Are Slack/Discord/Telegram supported?**
Yes, all 17 channels. Bot setup in order at [catalog → channels](../katalog.html#kanallar--17).

**Can it connect to Notion?**
Yes, with the `notion` ARM.

**Can an MCP server be added?**
Yes, Many MCP tools can be connected to BAIOS as ARMs. [MCP guide](mcp-rehberi.html)

**Triggering GitHub Actions?**
workflow_dispatch with the `deploy` ARM.

---

## Enterprise

**Can it be used in a team?**
Active development — Phase 13 multi-tenant + RBAC + LDAP. [Enterprise](../../kurumsal/index.html)

**On-prem?**
Yes, with docker-compose.

**SOC2?**
Targeted for 2027. [Compliance](../../kurumsal/compliance.html)

**Price?**
Individual MIT (free). Enterprise support + training + custom development is a separate commercial agreement. [Contact](../../kurumsal/iletisim.html)

---

## Edge

**Does it run on ESP32?**
Active research. Bridge mode (ESP32 sensor + Pi orchestrator) will be ready first. [Edge](../edge/index.html)

**Raspberry Pi?**
Targeted for Pi 4 / 5; still an early prototype.

---

## Contribution & Community

**Can I open a PR?**
Of course. [Developer guide](gelistiriciler.html#pr-açma)

**Where are bugs reported?**
GitHub Issues: [github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios/issues](https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios/issues)

**Are there Discussions?**
Being actively prepared.

**What is omgunbay?**
The chatbot, RAG over the BAIOS documentation. [omgunbay](omgunbay.html)

---

## Still Can't Find It?

- The **omgunbay** chat window at the bottom right (coming soon)
- Open a GitHub Issue
- The `~/.baios/logs/baios.log` file (a clue about the problem)

---

# /en/kaynaklar/tutorial.html

# Tutorial

The BAIOS guide from start to finish. Complete it in 45 minutes and you will have set up your own workflow.

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../../kaynaklar/tutorial.html)

---

## 0. Before You Start

**Requirements:**
- Python 3.12+
- An LLM provider (API key OR local Ollama)
- 15 minutes of focus

**Result:** You will become a BAIOS user with your own project, connected ARMs, and a working skill.

---

## Part 1 — Installation (5 min)

### 1.1 Install BAIOS

```bash
# early version — from GitHub (PyPI release coming soon)
git clone https://github.com/ilkerbay0605-baios-xhalfe/baios
cd baios && ./run.sh start
```

On first launch it asks for personalization:
- Name
- Language (Turkish recommended)
- Your preferred communication tone (friendly / formal / technical)

### 1.2 Choose an LLM provider

**Local (free, no internet needed):**
```bash
# New terminal:
ollama serve
ollama pull llama3.2

# BAIOS terminal:
baios config set llm.provider local
```

**OpenAI (speed + quality):**
```bash
baios config set llm.provider openai
baios config set openai.api_key sk-...
```

**Anthropic (long context):**
```bash
baios config set llm.provider anthropic
baios config set anthropic.api_key sk-ant-...
```

### 1.3 Test it

```bash
baios> merhaba
```

A conversation should start. For the web UI:
```bash
baios serve
# → http://localhost:8000
```

---

## Part 2 — First Project (5 min)

### 2.1 Create a project

Think of a project tied to a purpose. For example **"weekly budget tracking"** or **"math lessons"** or **"blog post pool"**.

```
baios> /proje yeni butce "Aylık gelir-gider takibi"
baios> /proje sec butce
```

Or from the web UI: **Projects → New**.

### 2.2 Project files

The project directory was created automatically:
```
~/.baios/projects/butce/
├── project_context.md       ← purpose, rules
├── project_tmp_context.md   ← temporary notes
├── project_config.json      ← connected ARMs/Skills
├── docs/                    ← put your materials here
└── outputs/                 ← skill outputs
```

### 2.3 Add material (optional)

If you have a budget Excel:
```bash
cp ~/bütçe.csv ~/.baios/projects/butce/docs/
```

### 2.4 Generate discipline

**Web UI:** Project page → **Work Discipline** → Write a goal → **Generate**

**CLI:**
```bash
baios> /disiplin uret "Aylık bütçe tutmak ve ay sonu özet çıkarmak"
```

The result is `discipline_v1.md` — the LLM prepared a workflow tailored to you.

---

## Part 3 — First ARM Setup (5 min)

### 3.1 What do you need?

Think: which external service does your project need?
- Read Gmail? → `gmail` ARM
- Pull info from the web? → `brave_search` ARM
- Weather? → `weather` ARM
- Just work with files? → **no ARM needed** (the file ARM is automatically available)

### 3.2 Install an ARM

**Web UI:** Library → ARM tab → find it → **Install**

**CLI:**
```bash
baios> /arm kur weather
# → asks for an API key → get one free from OpenWeatherMap: https://openweathermap.org/api
```

### 3.3 Connect it to the project

```bash
baios> /proje bagla arm weather
```

Now the `weather` ARM is available in the project context — the LLM knows about it.

---

## Part 4 — Running Your First Skill (10 min)

### 4.1 Choose a skill

`arastirma` is a simple and nice one to start with:
- You provide a topic
- It searches the web
- The LLM summarizes
- It saves to a file

### 4.2 Run it

**Web UI:** Library → Skill → `arastirma` → **Run**
- `konu`: something that interests you, e.g. "which plants grow in the kitchen"

**CLI:**
```bash
baios> /skill calistir arastirma konu="hangi bitkiler mutfakta yetişir"
```

### 4.3 Inspect the result

The output is in the project directory:
```
~/.baios/projects/butce/outputs/arastirma_hangi_bitkiler_mutfakta_yetisir.md
```

In the web UI you can open it from **Projects → butce → Files**.

---

## Part 5 — Natural Language Conversation (5 min)

Now stop memorizing commands and talk naturally:

```
baios> istanbul hava nasıl bugün?
baios> bütçe CSV'sinden toplam harcamayı hesapla
baios> "yeni teklif" ile başlayan mailleri listele (gmail ARM kuruluysa)
baios> bu araştırma dosyasından 5 madde özet çıkar
```

BAIOS reads the intent, selects the right ARM/Skill, and asks for approval on a risky operation.

---

## Part 6 — First Automation (10 min)

Automate a repeated task.

### 6.1 Define an automation

```
baios> /otomasyon kur
  Trigger: every Sunday 20:00
  Action: produce a budget summary + email it (to me)
```

### 6.2 See it run

```
baios> /otomasyon listele
```

It runs automatically the first Sunday at 20:00. You receive the output by email.

### 6.3 Change / stop

```
baios> /otomasyon durdur butce_ozet_haftalik
baios> /otomasyon sil butce_ozet_haftalik
```

---

## Part 7 — Wiki (5 min)

Make the knowledge accumulating in the project permanent:

```
baios> /wiki olustur butce-kategoriler
```

BAIOS reviews the project contents + conversation history and prepares a wiki page. On every LLM call, the relevant pages automatically go into the context.

The accumulation builds up — the older your project gets, the smarter it becomes.

---

## Next Steps

| If you want | Go to |
|---|---|
| Profession-specific scenarios | [Scenarios](../bireysel/senaryolar.html) |
| To write your own skill | [Developer guide](gelistiriciler.html) |
| To connect an MCP server | [MCP guide](mcp-rehberi.html) |
| omgunbay chatbot | [omgunbay](omgunbay.html) |
| Frequently asked | [FAQ](sss.html) |

---

## Troubleshooting

**Skill error "Missing ARM":** install it with `/arm kur <name>`.

**LLM not responding:** `baios config show` → is the provider correct, is the key valid.

**File not found:** Is a project selected? `/proje durum`.

**Port conflict:** `baios serve --port 8080`.

**Log:** `tail -f ~/.baios/logs/baios.log`

---

# /en/mimari.html

# Architecture

🇹🇷 [Türkçe](../mimari.html)

BAIOS's anatomy map — for those who want to **understand** it, not just use it.

---

## Project Discipline

Each project is its own world. When BAIOS opens a project, it reads these files:

```
~/.baios/projects/<slug>/
├── project_context.md      ← permanent: purpose, rules, roles
├── project_tmp_context.md  ← temporary: recent operations, working notes
├── project_config.json     ← connected ARMs, skills, flows, automations
├── discipline_v<N>.md       ← working method produced with the model
├── docs/                    ← project materials
└── outputs/                 ← skill/flow outputs
```

**Discipline Engine:** It combines the project's materials, its goal, and BAIOS's current capabilities, and has the model produce a **step-by-step working method**. Each version is written to a file and versioned.

When the project changes, the discipline can be regenerated. Old versions stay in the archive.

---

## Context Layers

BAIOS does not send the model a single block of text — it sends it **in layers**:

| Layer | Content | When |
|---|---|---|
| **System** | BAIOS version, ARM/skill/flow counts, installed ARMs, active automations | Every message |
| **Project** | Active project info, project_context.md content, connected components | If a project is active |
| **Temporary** | project_tmp_context.md — recent operations | If a project is active |
| **Wiki** | Wiki pages relevant to the query (RAG) | If a relevant page exists |
| **Conversation** | Last N messages | Every message |
| **User message** | The current question/request | Every message |

**Why it matters:**
- The model won't make the "BAIOS doesn't have that skill" mistake (the list is in front of it).
- If the project changes, the context changes on its own.
- When a new ARM is added, all model conversations know it automatically — no stale list.

---

## ARM — Adapter

ARM = the adapter that connects BAIOS to the outside world.

**Categories:**
- **API-based:** Gmail, GitHub, Telegram, Notion, Brave Search, OpenWeather…
- **Local:** shell, file, file_read, web_reader, browser, sql, http, rss
